name: Sherlock Holmes — Deep MEG Narrative
description: A Radboud Data Repository dataset of 3 participants who each underwent many hours of MEG while listening to a Sherlock Holmes audiobook (~9 hours total). A deep electrophysiological resource for naturalistic language processing.
citation: Armeni K, et al. (2022). A 10-hour within-participant magnetoencephalography narrative dataset to test models of language comprehension. Scientific Data, 9, 278.
